retrieved_result: Contracts Contracts Overview On March 30, 2012, SAG-AFTRA was formed, merging Screen Actors Guild and the American Federation of Television and Radio Artists. Contracts negotiated by both unions remain in force under SAG-AFTRA. If you are a producer, please visit the Production Center for contract information
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses SAG-AFTRA contracts and union information, which is unrelated to integrated development environments (IDEs) or software development tools.

history.title: Contracts
history.description: Contracts Overview On March 30, 2012, SAG-AFTRA was formed, merging Screen Actors Guild and the American Federation of Television and Radio Artists. Contracts negotiated by both unions remain in force under SAG-AFTRA. If you are a producer, please visit the Production Center for contract information
